stemHtml:
An aircraft is flying directly from A 30°S, 060°W to B 25°S, 020°W. At a certain moment in time the true track of the aircraft is 091°. The aircraft is on track and the track angle error is 0°.

Which statement about this situation is correct?

options.a: The aircraft is flying along the great circle from A to B and has not yet passed the vertex of this great circle.
options.b: The aircraft is flying along the rhumb line from A to B and the true track angle of the rhumb line is 091°.
options.c: The aircraft is flying along the great circle from A to B and has already passed the vertex of this great circle.
options.d: The aircraft is flying along the great circle from A to B and will not pass the vertex of this great circle as it is not situated on the leg A to B.
